scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=packages/types && npm run build --workspace=apps/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=apps/web && npm run lint --workspace=packages/types
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=apps/web && npm run test --workspace=packages/types
scripts.type-check: npm run type-check --workspace=apps/web && npm run type-check --workspace=packages/types
